mechanism_narrative: The persistence of the federal funds rate below 1% signals an extended accommodative cycle that compresses discount rates and supports equity valuations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: If forward returns are not significantly positive when FEDFUNDS is below 1% (p-value > 0.10), or if the signal reverses after the first Fed rate hike.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in real retail sales (RSAFS) greater than 2% reflects sudden demand acceleration, which leads to positive investor sentiment and positive S&P 500 returns over the following week (5 trading days).
evidence_refs: fact:Retail sales surged 9.8% in March 2021 from February
failure_condition: If the average forward 5-day return following such triggers is not statistically greater than the unconditional mean (t-test p > 0.05), or if the signal produces more negative than positive returns over a 3-year walk-forward.

mechanism_narrative: When payroll employment (PAYEMS) increases by more than 200,000 new jobs per month and the unemployment rate (UNRATE) simultaneously declines, the combined signal indicates a robust labor market tightening that boosts corporate profits and supports long-run equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: If the joint signal is not associated with a significantly positive mean forward 60-day return (Rank IC <= 0.02 over rolling 3-year periods) or if the signal frequently occurs before equity drawdowns.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production (INDPRO) grows at an annualized rate above 5% over a three-month period, it signals robust supply-side expansion that translates into higher corporate output and earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If the average forward 20-day return after such triggers is negative or statistically indistinguishable from zero over a 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: During the early expansion phase of the business cycle, high real GDP growth (annualized > 3%) signals strong economic momentum that lifts corporate earnings and equity prices over the next quarter. In later cycle regimes this relationship may reverse due to overheating concerns.
regime_hint: early expansion phase (GDP accelerating from trough)
failure_condition: If forward 60-day returns in early expansion periods (as defined by GDPC1 acceleration from trough) are not significantly positive compared to unconditional returns, or if the signal's IC turns negative in any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate (UNRATE) declines below 5% from a higher level, it indicates the labor market has reached or passed full employment. Historically, this leads to wage inflation pressures and eventual monetary tightening, causing negative forward equity returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE was 6.0% in March 2021, trending down
failure_condition: If the average forward 20-day return after UNRATE crosses below 5% is not negative (or not significantly different from zero) over a multi-cycle sample, or if the signal triggers less than 10 times historically.

mechanism_narrative: When year-over-year CPI inflation (CPIAUCSL) exceeds 2% while the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) remains below 0.25%, real interest rates are deeply negative. This environment historically drives investors toward equities as an inflation hedge, producing positive S&P 500 returns over a 5-day horizon.
evidence_refs: fact:CPI inflation in March 2021 was 2.6% y/y
failure_condition: If the average forward 5-day return under these conditions is not positive or if the signal's Sharpe ratio is below 0.5 over a rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) act as a leading indicator for residential investment and consumer durables demand. An upward trend in HOUST signals strengthening economic activity that ultimately supports corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 returns over a quarterly horizon.
evidence_refs: fact:Housing starts were 1421k in Feb 2021, indicating strong demand
failure_condition: If the signal's rank correlation with forward 60-day returns is less than 0.05 over any 5-year historical window, or if the long-only strategy based on HOUST trends underperforms the buy-and-hold.
